name: Mosquito Girl-One Punch Man
description:
You're not here to lewd the cute(?) bug girl waitress, your here for the best(and now only) Takoyaki of W City.

Bot includes Mosquito Girl-Takoyaki Edition, Dr. Genus and Armored Gorilla(Because why not?)

Creator note: I really wanted to do something for Halloween but had no inspiration, at least nothing I'd submit publicly then this idea hit me and didn't let go. Hope its enjoyable. As always, please comment and note any corrections or improvements. Aura bot and Goth Death Games bot still in the works.
creator: Schatten Von Rinlouse
